page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg5.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6149 processor running at 3.1 GHz. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate mixed performance characteristics. Multi-core CPU performance is average, as shown by a stress-ng multi-core score of 7202.07 and a Passmark CPU score of 8278.74. However, single-core capabilities are weak, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1355.18 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1088.0. Memory performance also shows a distinct tradeoff: while small-block cached read bandwidth is average at 402.34 GB/sec, large-block uncached read bandwidth drops to a weak 38.36 GB/sec.

Given the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory-to-core ratio, this instance provides a stable environment for workloads that require predictable CPU access without extreme performance demands. It is suitable for general-purpose applications, basic software compilation, and lightweight text processing. However, it is less efficient for memory-intensive databases, large-scale LLM inference, or high-throughput web serving due to weak database operation benchmarks and low static web serving throughput.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg5.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 6149 vCPUs running at 3.1 GHz and 32.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on a 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data reveals average multi-core CPU performance and cached memory bandwidth, contrasted with weak single-core processing and uncached large-block memory reads. The instance is best suited for general-purpose workloads, software compilation, and moderate text processing, but exhibits performance limitations for high-throughput web serving, database operations, and large-scale language model inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg5.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core and weak single-core performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg5.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and average multi-core performance.
tagline: A dedicated general-purpose instance offering balanced compute and memory resources for standard workloads requiring predictable CPU allocation.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 6149 vCPUs at 3.1 GHz
32.0 GB of system memory with no bundled local storage
Average multi-core CPU and cached memory read performance
Weak single-core processing and uncached memory bandwidth
Best suited for general-purpose applications and software compilation
